words.meaning: to make a machine, system, or process start working
words.japaneseMeaning: 作動させる、有効にする
words.example: You need a code to activate the online account.

words.meaning: to take something back or remove yourself from an activity
words.example: He decided to withdraw from the race because of an injury.

words.meaning: to help something grow, improve, or become known
words.example: The campaign promotes healthy eating at school.

words.meaning: to become well again or return to a normal state
words.example: She will recover from the cold in a few days.

words.meaning: to damage something so badly that it cannot be used
words.example: A fire can destroy a wooden house quickly.

words.meaning: to arrange to keep a seat, room, or item for later use
words.example: We should reserve a table before the restaurant gets full.

words.meaning: to bring something back to its earlier condition
words.example: Volunteers helped restore the old community center.

words.meaning: to get away from danger or a difficult place
words.example: The family used the back door to escape the fire.

words.meaning: to give something and receive something else
words.example: We exchange gifts at the end of the year.

words.meaning: to recognize or name someone or something
words.example: Can you identify the bird in this photo?
